intro: A weathered X is gouged deep into the wet sand, half-buried by the tide.
title: X Marks the Spot
description: Someone marked this spot long ago. With three Treasure-Map Fragments to piece the chart together, you could dig up whatever was buried here. Short of that, you might still scratch up a stray fragment.

1.label: Dig at the X
1.tooltip:
(+) With 3 Treasure-Map Fragments: dig up a buried cache of rewards
(-) Spends the 3 fragments
1.selected: You drive your shovel into the sand at the heart of the X...

2.label: Scratch around
2.tooltip: (+) Turn up a single Treasure-Map Fragment
2.selected: You sift through the loose sand around the marking...

3.label: Walk the shoreline
3.selected: You leave the X behind and walk on down the beach.

dug: The shovel strikes wood - a buried cache! You haul the treasure up onto the sand.
notEnough: The chart is incomplete. You need three Treasure-Map Fragments to dig here.
scratched: Half-buried in the sand: another Treasure-Map Fragment!
